summary: Marketing is sprinting toward September's China Going-Global report launch in Singapore while redesigning the knowledge website and prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China for SEO, with urgent supplier scoring and Indonesia program page due this week.
summaryDetail: The top priority is the joint CKGSB-IE report 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global,' which must be finalized by early September for launch at Tech in Asia or Tyson events in Singapore. Felix is creating a one-pager proposal and confirming event partnerships; Julie is securing op-eds from both schools' leadership; and the team is translating the Chinese report and identifying alumni case studies. This week, the team must score overseas social media advertising suppliers by July 23 and publish the 'Disruptive Timing' news article. The knowledge website redesign is in progress: feedback on Joker's design is due from Joseph and Julie, combining elements from both proposals, with videos removed and more articles displayed on the homepage. SEO efforts are focused on ranking top 5 for China executive programs, prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China over US partnerships, with the SEO manager detailing Google Analytics conversion tracking and Joseph drafting initial search areas. Additionally, Joseph needs to create the Indonesia Emerging Markets program webpage, pending program details from Ben. Social media agency selection is expedited with Media Minds prioritized due to budget and time constraints.

meetings.title: Outlook账号问题排查
meetings.summary: 讨论并解决了Outlook账号因旧密码导致被锁定的问题，建议删除旧账号并重新登录以更新密码。

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting
meetings.summary: The team discussed worship activities and a location visit.

meetings.title: Knowledge Website Redesign Review
meetings.summary: The team reviewed two design proposals for the knowledge website, noting that Joker's version improves menu categorization but is too similar to the current site. Joseph's version offers a more editorial layout with more articles displayed, which the team likes. They decided to combine elements from both and provide specific feedback for Joker.

meetings.title: SEO & Program Prioritization Meeting
meetings.summary: Team discusses SEO strategy to rank in top 5 for China executive programs, prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships.

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting - June 29, 2026
meetings.summary: Team discussed feedback on menu categorization, school brochure updates, CES quotes, Ding Hight Hall video, Asia Start articles, Davos press release, social media agency search, and IE report translation. Decisions made on Shun Tian Shu press release approach and prioritizing Media Minds for social media.

meetings.title: New Chinese Playbook Report Planning
meetings.summary: Team plans a joint report between CKGSB and IE on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, with a main research piece by Professor Leeway and op-eds from both schools' leadership and alumni. Report to launch at Tech in Asia or Tyson event in Singapore in mid-September.

actionItems.meetingTitle: Re: 答复: CKGSB X Tech In ASIA
actionItems.detail: Partnership needs to be confirmed within July for planning; Xuan will handle upon return.

decisions.text: 删除旧账号并重新登录以更新密码是解决锁定问题的有效方法。
Remove videos as a separate category; they will be dispersed by topic.
Combine elements from Joker's and Joseph's designs for the final knowledge website.
Keep the school menu at the top and consider centering the knowledge menu.
Display more articles on the homepage, with a pinned article and latest articles below.
Bring indices (BCI, BSI) to the knowledge homepage.
Prioritize Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships for initial SEO efforts.
Include Berkeley program as a third priority for audit phase.
Only one press release for Shun Tian Shu, either incorporating 10 points or turning into 10-point article.
Prioritize Media Minds as social media agency due to budget constraints and time.
Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, jointly distributed.
Working title: 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
Report to be ready by early September for Singapore events.
Include op-eds from both schools' leadership and industry case studies from alumni.
The news article on 'Disruptive Timing' paper is approved for publication and promotion.
decisions.meetingTitle: Re: News Article on 'Disruptive Timing' Paper

decisions.text: Joseph Luke Duckworth is assigned to create the webpage for the Indonesia Emerging Markets program.
decisions.meetingTitle: Fwd: 关于Global Program新开印尼新兴市场项目的审批
